title: Sahaquiel fight PRS
wikitext:
[]: Sahaquiel fight PRS (spoilers) Post by CyberXIII » Sun Aug 16, 2009 6:13 pm Anyone else notice that when Sahaquiel impales Shinji with those whatchamacallits, it marks him with the holy Stigmata, just like the MP Evas? I just noticed that when I was watching End again, and they impaled his hands with the copy Lances of Longinus. Speaking of which, anyone else notice that Saha's drill-arm things look a look like the Lance?

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 16, 2009 6:20 pm Yes, everyone did. http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7281 Sorry, gotta temp-ban you for the recklessly spoilerific topic title (now changed). See you in three days.
